articles.headline: Trump declares 100% pharma tariffs—with exemptions
articles.summary: Trump announced 100% tariffs on imported patented drugs under Section 232 national security authority, but with significant exemptions for companies with pricing deals, onshoring commitments, and trade-deal countries. Generic drugs and biosimilars are exempt, and companies agreeing to build US manufacturing facilities face only 20% tariffs.
articles.why_it_matters: Major policy shift affecting pharma profit margins and supply chains, with immediate implications for investment strategies across the biopharma sector.

articles.headline: Gold overtakes U.S. Treasuries as the largest foreign reserve asset
articles.summary: For the first time in modern financial history, gold has surpassed US Treasuries as the world's largest foreign reserve asset in 2026, marking a significant shift in global monetary preferences. This reflects declining confidence in dollar-denominated assets amid geopolitical tensions and inflationary pressures.
articles.why_it_matters: Historic monetary shift with implications for dollar strength, Treasury demand, and portfolio allocation strategies across all asset classes.

articles.headline: Apple: Embarrassingly Simple Self-Distillation Improves Code Generation
articles.summary: Apple researchers demonstrate that large language models can improve at code generation using only their own outputs, without external verification or teacher models. Their 'simple self-distillation' method improved Qwen3-30B-Instruct from 42.4% to 55.3% pass@1 on LiveCodeBench by sampling diverse solutions at higher temperature, then fine-tuning on those samples.
articles.why_it_matters: Shows AI models can bootstrap their capabilities without external supervision, potentially reducing training costs and dependency on proprietary datasets.

articles.headline: Friday links: the standards of previous generations
articles.summary: Weekly roundup of investment insights and market commentary from Abnormal Returns, featuring curated links on market trends, investment philosophy, and financial planning perspectives. Known for high-quality synthesis of market wisdom from diverse sources.
articles.why_it_matters: High-priority weekly digest that often surfaces under-the-radar investment insights and contrarian perspectives worth forwarding.
